Class CashStorage

java.lang.Object
CashStorage
public class CashStorage extends Object
A Constructor class for Cash Storages/Vaults on the Vending Machine

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CashStorage(ArrayList<Denomination> cashList)
    Creates a CashStorage with regards to the current PHP Denominations

  • Constructor Details

    • CashStorage

      public CashStorage(ArrayList<Denomination> cashList)
      Creates a CashStorage with regards to the current PHP Denominations

      Stores them in increasing order

      Parameters:
      cashList - The ArrayList which stores the denominations

  • Method Details

    • addCash

      public void addCash(Denomination cash)
      Adds cash to the Cash Vault

      If denomination value already exists, only the quantity is updated Else, A new denomination will be created and will be added in increasing order

      Parameters:
      cash - The Denomination to be added

    • removeCash

      public boolean removeCash(Denomination cash)
      Removes a certain amount of a denomination
      Parameters:
      cash - The denomination to be removed
      Returns:
      true if operation was successful, else false

    • getCashList

      public ArrayList<Denomination> getCashList()
      Gets the arraylist holidng all denominations
      Returns:
      the cashvault arraylist

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Gets the number of denominations in the list
      Returns:
      The size of the cash vault

    • removeDenomination

      public void removeDenomination(double value)
      Removes a denomination from the cash vault
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the denomination to be removed
